rulings.Case Title: OMAR SHAFIE VS. MEGHAN MCGARRY DANGANAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Third Motion To Compel Code Compliant Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Jobe Danganan And Meghan Mcgarry And Their Attorneys Joseph Oneil And The Tarkington Firm
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 5, 2018, Line 3. PLAINTIFF OMAR SHAFIE'S Third Motion To Compel Code Compliant Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Jobe Danganan And Meghan Mcgarry And Their Attorneys Joseph Oneil And The Tarkington Firm. GRANTED as follows: 2 hours of additional examination of Jobe Danganan; and 1 hour of Meghan McGarry. Requests for sanctions are denied. =(501/REQ)
